description: Evals for agentic-os-init. Tests discovery interview triggers and use-case routing.

evals.prompt: Can you initialize the Agentic OS structure in my project?
Where do I put CLAUDE.md and what goes in the context folder?
I want Claude to remember things between sessions. How do I set that up?
How do I get Claude to use skills in this project?
I want to set up an agent harness for my legacy system documentation project
I want Claude to run scheduled tasks every night. How do I set up the loop?
Create a new skill for me that converts markdown to Word
What did we decide last session? Check context/memory.md
I already have a CLAUDE.md but want to add the context folder structure and sub-agents
